basic_details.job_title: Collector Office Morbi District Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Collector Office Morbi has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 District Project Officer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 25-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master of Social Work (MSW) with minimum 70% or equivalent grade, Computer knowledge, Degree/Diploma/Certificate course in Disaster Management desirable
qualification.details: Master of Social Work (MSW) with a minimum of 70% or equivalent grade. Computer knowledge is mandatory. A Degree/Diploma/Certificate course in Disaster Management is desirable.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Collector Office Morbi District Project Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Collector Office Morbi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Collector Office Morbi District Project Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Collector Office Morbi District Project Officer Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master of Social Work (MSW) with a minimum of 70% or equivalent grade. Computer knowledge is mandatory. A Degree/Diploma/Certificate course in Disaster Management is desirable.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: Collector Office Morbi District Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Collector Office Morbi District Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Collector Office Morbi District Project Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the District Project Officer post is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the District Project Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master of Social Work (MSW) degree with a minimum of 70% marks or an equivalent grade. Computer knowledge is also essential, and a degree or diploma in Disaster Management is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the District Project Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the District Project Officer post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the District Project Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the District Project Officer position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 25,000.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of District Project Officer in the Collector Office Morbi.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the District Project Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview of the eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the District Project Officer post is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. Please check the provided links for download.
